requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Battery Regulation — Peru Has No EU-Style Battery Regulation
requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池法规——秘鲁没有欧盟式电池法规
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池法規——秘魯沒有歐盟式電池法規

summary.en: Peru does NOT have a horizontal battery regulation equivalent to EU Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. There is no Peruvian battery passport, no carbon-footprint declaration, no recycled-content threshold, and no critical-raw-material (cobalt, lithium, nickel, graphite) supply-chain due-diligence law imposed on battery exporters or importers. Instead, lithium batteries and power banks entering Peru are governed by sector instruments: voluntary or adopted INACAL NTP technical standards (which adopt IEC 62133), any applicable Reglamento Tecnico issued via PRODUCE/INDECOPI that mandates certification for specified electrical products, the energy-efficiency labelling scheme (Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica) administered by MINEM for products in its scope, and MTC equipment homologation where wireless functions are present. Environmental end-of-life management of batteries falls under general solid-waste and RAEE (waste electrical and electronic equipment) rules administered by MINAM, not under a dedicated battery regulation. There is no mandatory EU-style producer registration per battery chemistry for foreign exporters.
summary.zh: 秘鲁没有等同于欧盟法规（EU）2023/1542的横向电池法规。秘鲁没有电池护照、没有碳足迹声明、没有再生材料含量门槛，也没有针对电池出口商或进口商的关键原材料（钴、锂、镍、石墨）供应链尽职调查法律。进入秘鲁的锂电池和移动电源由分领域制度管辖：INACAL采纳IEC 62133的自愿性或已采纳的NTP技术标准；任何经PRODUCE/INDECOPI颁布、要求特定电气产品认证的技术规章（Reglamento Tecnico）；由MINEM管理、适用于其范围内产品的能效标签制度（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）；以及含无线功能时的MTC设备型号核准。电池报废环节的环境管理纳入由MINAM管理的一般固体废物及RAEE（废弃电气电子设备）规则，而非专门的电池法规。对外国出口商不存在欧盟式按电池化学体系强制注册生产者的制度。
summary.zht: 秘魯沒有等同於歐盟法規（EU）2023/1542的橫向電池法規。秘魯沒有電池護照、沒有碳足跡聲明、沒有再生材料含量門檻，也沒有針對電池出口商或進口商的關鍵原材料（鈷、鋰、鎳、石墨）供應鏈盡職調查法律。進入秘魯的鋰電池和行動電源由分領域制度管轄：INACAL採納IEC 62133的自願性或已採納的NTP技術標準；任何經PRODUCE/INDECOPI頒布、要求特定電氣產品認證的技術規章（Reglamento Tecnico）；由MINEM管理、適用於其範圍內產品的能效標籤制度（Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica）；以及含無線功能時的MTC設備型號核准。電池報廢環節的環境管理納入由MINAM管理的一般固體廢物及RAEE（廢棄電氣電子設備）規則，而非專門的電池法規。對外國出口商不存在歐盟式按電池化學體系強制註冊生產者的制度。

standards_or_laws: Peru has no horizontal battery regulation equivalent to EU Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (no battery passport, carbon footprint, recycled content, or supply-chain due-diligence law)
INACAL — Instituto Nacional de Calidad — issues NTP standards (adopting IEC) under Ley No. 30224 (National Quality System)
RAEE / waste management under MINAM (D.S. No. 009-2019-MINAM and general solid-waste framework) — domestic end-of-life, not an exporter battery regulation

summary.en: China likewise has no single horizontal battery regulation matching the EU model. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety) and, for certain rechargeable battery categories sold domestically, mandatory CCC certification under the CNCA catalogue. China's domestic producer-responsibility and recycling obligations sit under the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) and the 2021 Battery Recycling Management Measures; these apply within China and are structurally different from any EU-style passport or due-diligence regime. For the Peru lane, the practical point is that neither side imposes a battery-passport / carbon-footprint / critical-mineral due-diligence regime, so this row is a 'no equivalent regime on either side' comparison.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有与欧盟模式相匹配的单一横向电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）约束；部分在国内销售的可充电电池类别还须依据CNCA目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国国内的生产者责任及回收义务纳入《固体废物污染环境防治法》（2020年修订）及2021年《废旧电池回收管理办法》，仅在中国境内适用，与任何欧盟式护照或尽职调查制度在结构上不同。就秘鲁通道而言，关键在于双方均未设电池护照/碳足迹/关键矿产尽职调查制度，因此本行属于“双方均无对应制度”的对照。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有與歐盟模式相匹配的單一橫向電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）約束；部分在國內銷售的可充電電池類別還須依據CNCA目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國國內的生產者責任及回收義務納入《固體廢物污染環境防治法》（2020年修訂）及2021年《廢舊電池回收管理辦法》，僅在中國境內適用，與任何歐盟式護照或盡職調查制度在結構上不同。就秘魯通道而言，關鍵在於雙方均未設電池護照/碳足跡/關鍵礦產盡職調查制度，因此本行屬於「雙方均無對應制度」的對照。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic producer-responsibility framework
MIIT/NDRC Battery Recycling Management Measures (2021) — domestic recycling obligations

gap.en: Unlike the China-to-EU lane, there is NO EU-style battery-regulation gap for Peru: Peru imposes no battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or critical-mineral supply-chain due-diligence on lithium battery exporters. Chinese exporters do not need to build battery-passport or due-diligence documentation for Peru. The real Peruvian obligations are sector-specific (INACAL NTP / IEC 62133 safety, any applicable Reglamento Tecnico certification, MTC homologation for wireless, UN 38.3 transport, importer of record) and are addressed in the other rows. The only residual environmental consideration is general RAEE / solid-waste handling at the importer/distributor level, which is far lighter than EU EPR per chemistry.
gap.zh: 与中国-欧盟通道不同，秘鲁不存在欧盟式电池法规差距：秘鲁未对锂电池出口商施加电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或关键矿产供应链尽职调查。中国出口商无需为秘鲁准备电池护照或尽职调查文件。秘鲁的真正义务属于分领域要求（INACAL NTP/IEC 62133安全、任何适用的技术规章认证、无线型号的MTC核准、UN 38.3运输、进口商主体），已在其他行说明。唯一残留的环境考量是进口商/分销商层面的一般RAEE/固体废物处理，远轻于欧盟按化学体系的EPR。
gap.zht: 與中國-歐盟通道不同，秘魯不存在歐盟式電池法規差距：秘魯未對鋰電池出口商施加電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或關鍵礦產供應鏈盡職調查。中國出口商無需為秘魯準備電池護照或盡職調查文件。秘魯的真正義務屬於分領域要求（INACAL NTP/IEC 62133安全、任何適用的技術規章認證、無線型號的MTC核准、UN 38.3運輸、進口商主體），已在其他行說明。唯一殘留的環境考量是進口商/分銷商層面的一般RAEE/固體廢物處理，遠輕於歐盟按化學體系的EPR。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style battery regulation in force — Peru has no battery passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or critical-mineral due-diligence obligation for battery exporters; only general RAEE/solid-waste rules (MINAM) apply at the domestic end-of-life level
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety and customs declaration are domestic export requirements; China's producer-responsibility/recycling duties apply within China only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, so the single biggest China-to-EU compliance gap (battery passport, carbon footprint, critical-mineral due diligence, per-chemistry EPR) simply does not exist for the Peru lane. Chinese exporters should not over-invest in passport/due-diligence paperwork for Peru. The binding Peruvian obligations are the IEC-62133-based safety standard adopted by INACAL, any applicable Reglamento Tecnico, MTC homologation for wireless, UN 38.3 transport, and a local importer of record — covered in the other rows. General RAEE/solid-waste handling is a domestic distributor-level matter, not an exporter battery regulation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁没有欧盟式横向电池法规，因此中国-欧盟通道中最大的合规差距（电池护照、碳足迹、关键矿产尽职调查、按化学体系EPR）在秘鲁通道根本不存在。中国出口商不应为秘鲁过度投入护照/尽职调查文件。秘鲁的约束性义务是INACAL采纳的基于IEC 62133的安全标准、任何适用的技术规章、无线型号的MTC核准、UN 38.3运输及当地进口商主体——已在其他行说明。一般RAEE/固体废物处理属于国内分销商层面事项，并非针对出口商的电池法规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯沒有歐盟式橫向電池法規，因此中國-歐盟通道中最大的合規差距（電池護照、碳足跡、關鍵礦產盡職調查、按化學體系EPR）在秘魯通道根本不存在。中國出口商不應為秘魯過度投入護照/盡職調查文件。秘魯的約束性義務是INACAL採納的基於IEC 62133的安全標準、任何適用的技術規章、無線型號的MTC核准、UN 38.3運輸及當地進口商主體——已在其他行說明。一般RAEE/固體廢物處理屬於國內分銷商層面事項，並非針對出口商的電池法規。

source.publisher: INACAL — Instituto Nacional de Calidad (Gobierno del Peru)
